text: Imagine uploading a picture of any character, and getting a Minecraft version you can actually use in the game.
pronounce_text: Imagine uploading a picture of any character, and getting a Minecraft version you can actually use in the game.

text: That sounds like a simple image filter.

text: But a Minecraft-style picture is not the same as a playable Minecraft character.In the game, the character is a 3D block model, and its appearance is defined by a specific 2D UV map layout wrapped around that model.

text: So the real challenge is: can AI turn a normal reference image into that specific UV map, so it actually works as a Minecraft character?
